title: Cloud Operation Engineer (Azure)
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a Senior Cloud Operation Engineer to manage and enhance the reliability, security, and performance of critical on-premises and cloud (Azure) platforms. This role offers hands-on exposure to hybrid infrastructure, automation, and modern cloud technologies, while giving you the opportunity to drive platform modernisation in a highly impactful environment.

If you enjoy solving complex infrastructure challenges and building resilient, future-ready platforms, this role will provide excellent technical growth and real-world impact.

Working Hours: 8.30am–6.00pm (Mon–Thu), 8.30am–5.30pm (Fri)
Location: Sentosa
Employment Type: 1-year renewable contract
Benefits: Annual Leave, Birthday Leave, Medical Benefits, AWS

Key Responsibilities

  • Monitor, maintain, and optimise platform performance across on-premises and Azure environments

  • Perform capacity planning, patching, and lifecycle management to ensure system health and availability

  • Drive automation initiatives and implement infrastructure standards to improve efficiency and reliability

  • Execute monthly patching with minimal service disruption in hybrid environments

  • Provide L2/L3 BAU support for Azure and on-premises platform incidents

  • Support containerised workloads using Docker and Kubernetes, and enable hybrid cloud adoption

  • Develop and maintain SOPs and technical documentation

Key Requirements

  • Hands-on experience with Microsoft Azure and hybrid cloud environments

  • Strong knowledge of Linux and Windows Server administration

  • Experience with container technologies (Docker, Kubernetes)

  • Experience with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Ansible or similar tools)

  • Familiarity with Nutanix and virtualisation technologies

  • Solid understanding of networking fundamentals (TCP/IP, DNS, load balancing, security concepts)

  • Scripting experience with Python, PowerShell, or Bash

  • Experience with monitoring and observability tools

Qualifications

  • Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or related discipline

  • Min. 4 years of experience in infrastructure or platform engineering roles

  • Proven experience supporting large-scale or high-availability systems

    By submitting your resume, you consent to the collection, use, and disclosure of your personal information per ScienTec’s Privacy Policy (scientecconsulting.com/privacy-policy).

    This authorizes us to:

    • Contact you about potential opportunities.

    • Delete personal data as it is not required at this application stage.

    All applications will be processed with strict confidence. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

    Elaine Wong (Zoe) l Outsourcing Team

    ScienTec Consulting Pte Ltd - 11C5781

postedCompany.description:
An award-winning company founded in 2004, ScienTec has transformed organizations across Asia Pacific with our 4 principal services: Staffing, Specialist Search, Outsourcing and HR Consulting.

Our "People First, Always" core value underpins our mission to redefine the standards of HR services and deliver you top-tier candidate support, as reflected in our attainment of key accolades such as Recruitment Agency of the Year, Best Client Service, and Best Candidate Experience.


Our sector and functional coverage include ICT/technology, industrial engineering, and corporate services recruitment.


By submitting your resume, you give your express consent that ScienTec Consulting may use your personal information to process your job application and to contact you from time to time for future employment opportunities.

For further information on how ScienTec Consulting processes your personal information and how to access and correct your information, please read the ScienTec Consulting’s Privacy Policy (https://www.scientecconsulting.com/privacy-policy).

Please do not submit any sensitive personal data to us in your resume (such as government ID numbers, ethnicity, gender, religion, marital status) as we do not collect your personal data at this time.


All job applications will be processed with strict confidence and only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
